svg.title: Debug platform block diagram
svg.desc: High-level block diagram of the Debug Web3 Bug Bounty platform showing external entities, frontend, backend, and data layers with data flow arrows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Security Researcher role in Debug')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Organization role in Debug')
sendPrompt('What does the React UI handle in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What does Ethers.js Web3 Provider do in Debug?')
sendPrompt('How does Supabase Auth work in the Debug frontend?')
sendPrompt('What does the Express API router handle in Debug?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini AI triage vulnerability reports in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ethereum smart contract do in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What data does Supabase PostgreSQL store in Debug?')
sendPrompt('What is stored on the blockchain in Debug?')
